items.feature: Home header redesign (completion ring, medical card, layout)
steps: Open Home on dev API build
Confirm top row: completion widget (left), logo (center), bell (right)
Confirm greeting + location left, floating medical profile card ~45% width right
Confirm search bar below header; texture is subtle (~4% opacity)
Tap completion ring → opens /profile/completion
Tap medical card → opens /profile

items.feature: Profile completion checklist with deep links to edit sections
steps: Open Profile Completion from home ring or /profile/completion
Confirm percentage ring shows without label overlap
Tap a missing item (e.g. Blood group, Allergies)
Verify edit form opens and scrolls to that section
Complete a field, return — confirm completion % updates
items.notes:
2 label overlap is still there
2.5 add none as an acceptable option for allergies, Medical conditions, Medical Aid and Primary provider

items.feature: Emergency medical profile view and edit
steps: Open Profile → view emergency medical summary
Open Edit profile — blood group, allergies, conditions, emergency contact
Fill medical aid, medications, primary provider sections
Save and confirm data persists after app restart
Switch family member — confirm correct member profile loads
items.notes: Exception on adding a family member, move profile switch to the main profile page

items.feature: Conditions catalog picker (common, show more, Other, submit)
steps: Edit profile → Conditions → open picker sheet
Select common conditions — confirm chips appear on profile
Tap Show more — confirm extended list loads
Choose Other — enter custom condition and submit
Confirm custom label shows on profile immediately
Verify submission appears in admin Conditions → Pending
items.notes: 3 unable to enter custom condition an to submit it, the keyboard does not appear

items.feature: Unified family member picker on profile flows
steps: Open profile with multiple family members
Switch member via picker — confirm header/summary updates
Edit one member's conditions — confirm other members unchanged

items.feature: Health vault and privacy controls
steps: Navigate to Health Vault / privacy settings
Toggle privacy options — confirm UI state matches selection
Return to profile — confirm restricted data respects privacy setting
items.notes:
- allow export to local device,
- include a security pin to lock the backup
- on reinstallation app should search local health repository for backup, and if found in can be imported if correct pin is provided.

items.feature: Backup and restore
steps: Open backup — create backup file
Clear or modify local data
Restore from backup — confirm profile data returns

items.feature: Emergency hub (contacts, quick actions)
steps: Open Emergency hub from home or nav
Confirm emergency numbers / quick actions display
Tap call/action links — confirm correct handler (dialer/maps)
items.notes: no service providers are visible for my location

items.feature: Medical aid catalog search with chips
steps: Edit profile → Medical aid section
Search for a scheme — confirm results load from API
Select scheme — confirm chip/label saved on profile

items.feature: Upcoming appointments banner and API sync
steps: Home screen — confirm upcoming appointment banner when bookings exist
Open appointments list — confirm sync with dev API
Pull to refresh — confirm loading and updated data
items.notes: Reminder scheduled should appear on homepage and not bookings page

items.feature: Facility cards and public profile display
steps: Search for a facility with public profile configured
Open facility detail — confirm logo, hours, services from public profile API
Confirm card layout matches redesign (image, badges, distance)

items.feature: Search origin debug strip (dev builds)
steps: On dev build home screen, locate debug strip showing search origin
Change location permission / GPS — confirm origin updates
Confirm strip hidden or absent on release builds if applicable

items.feature: Conditions tab — catalog CRUD and pending submissions
steps: Log into admin at dev.smarthealth.co.zw
Content → Conditions tab loads
Add/edit/delete a common condition — confirm API persists
Review pending user submissions — approve or reject
Confirm approved items appear in mobile common list after refresh

items.feature: Geocoding tab for failed facility geocodes
steps: Admin → Geocoding tab
Confirm failed geocode queue lists facilities
Retry or manually fix coordinates — confirm status updates
Verify facility appears correctly on map/search after fix

items.feature: Public profile configuration
steps: Log into facility portal on dev
Open public profile settings — upload logo, set hours, services
Save — confirm success toast
Verify patient app facility detail reflects changes
items.notes:
2. I have failed to add Gynaecology as a service. make all the services that appear here be configured from the admin portal under a services tab next to conditions. allow facilities to submit new services which will be submited from approval and global availability  from the admin section
make all the Medical Aid companies that appear here be configured from the admin portal under a Medical
2.1 Aid tab next to Services, allow facilities to submit new medical aids which will be submited from approval and global availability  from the admin section

items.feature: Map pin editor for facility coordinates
steps: Facility portal → map pin editor
Drag pin or enter coordinates — save
Confirm coordinates persist on reload
Search nearby in patient app — distance/order reflects new pin

items.feature: Staff invite, calendar appointments, nav cleanup
steps: Invite staff member — confirm email/link flow
Open calendar — appointments load without errors
Create/view appointment — confirm CRUD works
Confirm nav items match expected structure (no dead links)
items.notes:
1. Adding a staff member did not send them an invite
move the staff tab to under facility profile. make doctors a tab under staff tab

items.feature: Facility logo uses public Supabase URL (browser-visible)
steps: Upload facility logo in portal
Confirm logo previews in portal (not broken image)
Open same facility in patient app — logo renders

items.feature: Profile conditions catalog endpoints
steps: GET /v1/catalog/profile-conditions — returns common conditions
POST user custom condition — returns pending status
Admin approve — GET list includes new common entry

items.feature: Emergency hub API
steps: Call emergency hub endpoint from mobile or curl
Confirm contacts/resources payload shape matches app expectations

items.feature: Medical aid catalog search
steps: GET medical aid search with query string
Confirm results match schemes in database
Confirm empty query handling

items.feature: Facility public profile API
steps: GET public profile for facility with config
Confirm logo URL, hours, services in JSON
GET facility without config — graceful empty/partial response

items.feature: Google as sole geocoding provider
steps: Trigger geocode for test facility (admin or CLI)
Confirm coordinates returned and stored
Failed geocode appears in admin Geocoding tab

items.feature: Postgres facility_types parsing in nearby responses
steps: GET nearby facilities endpoint
Confirm facility_types is array (not raw Postgres string)
Confirm type filters work in patient search
